activity_summary: A field operations manager assigns, reschedules, or escalates a repair visit using route, parts, and SLA constraints.

verification_checklist: Run npm test
Run npm run capture:model-ui:screenshots
feature render paths must not emit raw input, select, textarea, or checkbox markup outside approved helpers
new primitives or variants require updating the repo-local contract first
generated UI must include a local check command or equivalent static inspection
gpt55-xhigh-codex-with-judgmentkit desktop screenshot has a styled primary work surface
gpt55-xhigh-codex-with-judgmentkit mobile screenshot keeps the decision and handoff visible
desktop viewport screenshot
mobile viewport screenshot
keyboard focus check for interactive controls
overflow check for long labels, descriptions, and values
modal or dialog footer order check when dialogs are present
disabled, empty, error, and ready state review
Verify state: selected work item is visible
Verify state: decision evidence is scannable
Verify state: primary action and handoff reason are clear
Verify required state: empty
Verify required state: ready
Verify required state: loading
Verify required state: error
Verify required state: disabled
Verify required state: focus-visible

command_display: codex exec --model gpt-5.5 -c model_reasoning_effort="xhigh" --sandbox read-only --skip-git-repo-check --ephemeral --color never --output-schema <schema> --output-last-message <output> -
notes: GPT-5.5 output captured through codex for the JudgmentKit 3x4 model UI matrix.

parsed.summary: Static dispatch review UI focused on requesting missing site access before assigning the nearest qualified technician within the SLA window.
parsed.css: *{box-sizing:border-box}body{margin:0;background:#eef2ef;color:#1f2723;font-family:Inter,ui-sans-serif,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',sans-serif}.dispatch-surface{min-height:100vh;padding:24px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:18px}.topbar{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;gap:18px;border-bottom:1px solid #cfd8d1;padding-bottom:16px}.eyebrow{margin:0 0 6px;color:#5f6f67;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0;text-transform:uppercase}.topbar h1{margin:0;font-size:28px;line-height:1.15;font-weight:760}.shift-status{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end}.status-pill{min-height:32px;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;border:1px solid #cbd6d0;background:#fff;border-radius:999px;padding:6px 10px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#32413a}.status-pill:before,.state-line:before,.check-item:before{content:'';width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:#6f7f77;margin-right:8px;flex:0 0 auto}.is-ready:before{background:#198754}.is-warning:before{background:#b7791f}.is-error:before,.is-blocked:before{background:#c2410c}.is-loading:before{background:#2f7f9b;animation:pulse 1.2s ease-in-out infinite}.is-empty:before{background:#8a9490}@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:.35}}@media (prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.is-loading:before{animation:none}}.surface-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:310px minmax(0,1fr);gap:18px;align-items:start}.queue-panel,.panel{background:#fff;border:1px solid #d4ddd7;border-radius:8px;box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(20,34,27,.06)}.queue-panel{padding:14px;position:sticky;top:18px}.panel{padding:18px}.section-heading{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;margin-bottom:12px}.section-heading h2{margin:0;font-size:17px;line-height:1.25}.section-heading p{margin:0;color:#607169;font-size:13px}.visit-list{list-style:none;margin:0;padding:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px}.visit-row{width:100%;min-height:76px;border:1px solid #d7dfda;background:#f9fbfa;border-radius:8px;padding:10px;text-align:left;display:grid;gap:6px;cursor:pointer;color:#1f2723}.visit-row:hover{border-color:#8bb7a5;background:#f4faf7}.visit-row:focus-visible,.decision-button:focus-visible,.handoff-button:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #2f7f9b;outline-offset:2px}.visit-row.is-selected{border-color:#216e58;background:#edf7f3;box-shadow:inset 3px 0 0 #216e58}.visit-main,.visit-meta{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;min-width:0}.visit-id{font-weight:800}.visit-customer,.visit-meta span,.control-hint{overflow-wrap:anywhere}.visit-meta{color:#5b6b63;font-size:13px}.control-hint{font-size:12px;color:#216e58;font-weight:800}.queue-states{border-top:1px solid #e0e7e2;margin-top:14px;padding-top:12px;display:grid;gap:8px}.state-line{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;color:#56665e;font-size:13px;line-height:1.35}.content-stack{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1.12fr) minmax(320px,.88fr);gap:18px}.column{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:18px}.request-copy{margin:0 0 16px;font-size:16px;line-height:1.45}.fact-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:12px;margin:0}.fact-grid div{border-top:1px solid #e3e9e5;padding-top:10px;min-width:0}.fact-grid dt{font-size:12px;color:#66766e;font-weight:800;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0;margin:0 0 4px}.fact-grid dd{margin:0;font-weight:750;overflow-wrap:anywhere}.checklist{list-style:none;margin:0;padding:0;display:grid;gap:12px}.check-item{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:0;border-bottom:1px solid #edf1ee;padding-bottom:12px}.check-item:last-child{border-bottom:0;padding-bottom:0}.check-item div{min-width:0}.check-item strong{display:block;margin-bottom:3px}.check-item p,.policy-copy,.decision-copy,.handoff-note p{margin:0;color:#52635b;line-height:1.45;overflow-wrap:anywhere}.policy-copy{background:#f7f6f0;border-left:4px solid #a26b25;padding:12px;border-radius:6px}.decision-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:10px}.decision-button{min-height:76px;border:1px solid #cad5cf;background:#f9fbfa;border-radius:8px;padding:12px;text-align:left;color:#1f2723;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;justify-content:center;font-weight:800;cursor:pointer}.decision-button span{font-size:13px;line-height:1.35;color:#5a6a62;font-weight:600}.decision-button.primary{background:#216e58;color:#fff;border-color:#216e58}.decision-button.primary span{color:#e6f3ee}.decision-button[aria-disabled='true']{cursor:not-allowed;color:#6e7b75;background:#f2f5f3;border-style:dashed}.handoff-panel{border-color:#b9d0c4}.handoff-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr));gap:10px;margin-bottom:14px}.handoff-grid div{background:#f4faf7;border:1px solid #d5e6dd;border-radius:8px;padding:10px;min-width:0}.handoff-grid span{display:block;color:#64746c;font-size:12px;font-weight:800;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0;margin-bottom:4px}.handoff-grid strong{display:block;overflow-wrap:anywhere}.handoff-note{border-top:1px solid #dde7e1;border-bottom:1px solid #dde7e1;padding:12px 0;margin-bottom:12px}.handoff-note .reason{margin-top:8px;color:#8a3c13;font-weight:700}.handoff-actions{display:flex;justify-content:flex-end;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap}.handoff-button{min-height:42px;border:1px solid #216e58;background:#216e58;color:#fff;border-radius:8px;padding:10px 14px;font-weight:800;cursor:pointer}.handoff-button.secondary{background:#fff;color:#216e58}.sla-badge{background:#fff4d8;color:#714a00;border:1px solid #e0bc72;border-radius:999px;padding:5px 9px;font-size:12px;font-weight:800;white-space:nowrap}@media (max-width:900px){.dispatch-surface{padding:16px}.topbar{flex-direction:column}.shift-status{justify-content:flex-start}.surface-grid,.content-stack{grid-template-columns:1fr}.queue-panel{position:static}.decision-grid,.handoff-grid,.fact-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}.topbar h1{font-size:24px}}
parsed.html:
Repair visit dispatch review

Same-day repair visits before dispatch

3 visits waiting1 SLA risk

Visit queue

Repair visits

Today
Selected repair visit is ready for dispatch review.Route times are refreshing for later visits.Parts readiness is delayed for V-2188.No unsorted repair visits waiting.

Selected visit

V-2187 Mallory Chen

SLA 4h

Kitchen freezer repair needs dispatch before the service window closes.

Plan
Priority repair
Current state
Needs gate code
Best technician
Reyes, 18 minutes from site
Repair item
Kitchen freezer fan motor

Readiness checklist

Route, parts, access, and SLA

  • Route and certification

    Reyes is 18 minutes from the site and certified for the freezer unit.

  • Parts readiness

    Replacement fan motor is available at the west depot.

  • Site access

    Customer gate code is missing before dispatch.

  • SLA risk

    Resolve access now so Reyes can still be assigned within the service window.

Dispatch policy

Same-day assignment rule

Same-day SLA visits can be assigned when parts and site access are confirmed. Missing access details return to dispatch support before technician assignment.

Decision path

Recommended next action

Request the gate code, then assign Reyes after site access is confirmed.

Dispatch handoff

Send to dispatch support

Next ownerDispatch support
Timing constraintBefore the SLA window narrows
Technician to holdReyes

Request the gate code, then assign Reyes within the SLA window.

Reason: Gate code is missing before the qualified technician can be assigned.
